end bt=bt+cb end end end a[bq[ba]]=bw(br,bv,f)elseif bq[z]==0b101_0001 then a[bq[ba]][a[bq[x]]]=a[bq[s]];else a[bq[ba]]=#a[bq[x]];end local bq=k[bl+0B100]if not((bq[z])~=(0B1011_0010))then
